channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Resuscitative endovascular balloon occlusion of the aorta may not improve outcomes in adults with non-traumatic out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
item.description: 1. Resuscitative endovascular balloon occlusion of the aorta (REBOA) as an adjunct to advanced life support (ALS) does not improve rates of return of ...

item.title: What do Argentine scientists know about hantavirus so far?
item.description: The Andes strain of hantavirus typically circulates via rodents, but human-to-human transmission such as the outbreak aboard the MV Hondius is not imp...

item.title: Idiopathic Acute Pancreatitis: Are Hidden Causes Missed?
item.description: Researchers note that microlithiasis and biliary sludge are common causes of presumed idiopathic pancreatitis, which standard ultrasound often fails t...

item.title: Study links use of new obesity drugs to reduction of asthma exacerbations and inhaler use
item.description: New research presented at the European Congress on Obesity in Istanbul, Turkey (May 12–15) shows the use of the new GLP-1 class of obesity drugs in pe...
